questions.question: What is the earliest plausible timeframe in which artificial general intelligence (AGI) will achieve reliable human-level autonomous decision-making in high-stakes contexts?
questions.why_it_matters: Knowing this timeline impacts investment, regulation, and safety preparations for transformative AI technologies.

questions.question: Will quantum internet technology become viable for global secure communication within the next 15 years?
questions.why_it_matters: This would revolutionize cybersecurity, geopolitics, and data privacy frameworks worldwide.

questions.question: Is global geopolitical stability likely to improve or deteriorate over the next decade given current multipolar tensions?
questions.why_it_matters: This influences international cooperation, conflict risk management, and global economic forecasts.

questions.question: Can large-scale digital democracy platforms achieve meaningful citizen governance participation without exacerbating polarization within 10 years?
questions.why_it_matters: Success or failure here will shape the future of democracy and public trust in institutions.
signals_to_watch: adoption rates of digital voting tools
case studies of pilot “digital democracy” projects

questions.question: Will AI-driven automation displace more than 30% of current human labor across all sectors globally within 20 years?
questions.why_it_matters: Answers inform policies on employment, social safety nets, and education system reforms.

questions.question: Can a universal vaccine platform be developed and deployed that covers all major viral families within the next 15 years?
questions.why_it_matters: This would drastically reduce pandemic risk and change global health strategies.

questions.question: Is achieving net-zero CO2 emissions globally by 2050 technically and economically feasible without large-scale reliance on fossil carbon removal?
questions.why_it_matters: This affects climate policy, energy investments, and global warming mitigation effectiveness.

questions.question: Will AI-generated content become the majority source of entertainment media consumption (video, text, audio) in at least half of global markets within 10 years?
questions.why_it_matters: This changes cultural influence, media economics, and intellectual property frameworks.
